subcommands.name: about
subcommands.description: shows information about poetry

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: adds a new dependency to pyproject.toml

options.description: the group to add the dependency to
add as a development dependency. (Deprecated) Use --group=dev instead
extras to activate for the dependency
python version for which the dependency must be installed
platforms for which the dependency must be installed
name of the source to use to install the package
output the operations but do not execute anything (implicitly enables --verbose)
do not perform operations (only update the lockfile)

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: builds a package, as a tarball and a wheel by default

options.description: limit the format to either sdist or wheel

subcommands.name: cache
subcommands.description: the cache command regroups sub commands to interact with poetry's cache

subcommands.name: clear
subcommands.description: clears a poetry cache by name

options.description: clear all entries in the cache

states.name: cache
states.description: the name of the cache to clear

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: list poetry's caches

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: checks the validity of the pyproject.toml file

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: manages configuration settings

options.description: set/Get from the project's local configuration

subcommands.name: debug
subcommands.description: the debug command regroups sub commands to interact with debug session

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: shows debug information

subcommands.name: resolve
subcommands.description: debugs dependency resolution

options.description: extras to activate for the dependency
python version(s) to use for resolution
show what would be installed for the current system

subcommands.name: env
subcommands.description: the env command regroups sub commands to interact with the virtualenvs associ...

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: displays information about the current environment

options.description: only display the environment's python executable path

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: lists all virtualenvs associated with the current project

options.description: output the full paths of the virtualenvs

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: remove virtual environments associated with the project

options.description: remove all managed virtual environments associated with the project

states.name: python
states.description: the python executables associated with, or names of the virtual environments...

subcommands.name: use
subcommands.description: activates or creates a new virtualenv for the current project

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: creates a basic pyproject.toml file in the current directory

options.description: package to require, with an optional version constraint, e.g. requests:^2.10....
package to require for development, with an optional version constraint, e.g....

the only dependency groups to include
do not install the development dependencies. (Deprecated)
synchronize the environment with the locked packages and the specified groups
do not install the root package (the current project)
do not install any directory path dependencies; useful to install dependencie...

removes packages not present in the lock file. (Deprecated)
extra sets of dependencies to install

subcommands.name: lock
subcommands.description: locks the project dependencies

options.description: do not update locked versions, only refresh lock file
check that the poetry.lock file corresponds to the current version of pyproje...

subcommands.name: new
subcommands.description: creates a new Python project at <path>

options.description: use the src layout for the project
specify the readme file format. One of md (default) or rst

states.name: path
states.description: the path to create the project at

subcommands.name: publish
subcommands.description: publishes a package to a remote repository

options.description: the repository to publish the package to
the username to access the repository
the password to access the repository
certificate authority to access the repository
client certificate to access the repository
perform all actions except upload the package
ignore errors from files already existing in the repository

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: removes a package from the project dependencies

options.description: the group to remove the dependency from
remove a package from the development dependencies. (Deprecated) Use --group=...
output the operations but do not execute anything (implicitly enables --verbose)

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: runs a command in the appropriate environment

states.name: args
states.description: the command and arguments/options to run

subcommands.name: search
subcommands.description: searches for packages on remote repositories

subcommands.description: add additional packages to poetry's runtime environment

the only dependency groups to include

list the dependencies as a tree

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: add source configuration for project

options.description: set this source as the default (disable PyPI). A default source will also be...
set this source as secondary. (Deprecated, use --priority)
set the priority of this source. One of: default, primary, secondary, supplem...

states.description: source repository URL. Required, except for PyPI, for which it is not allowed

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: remove source configured for the project

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: show information about sources configured for the project

states.name: source
states.description: source(s) to show information for. Defaults to showing all sources

subcommands.description: update the dependencies as according to the pyproject.toml file

options.description: the optional dependency groups to include
the only dependency groups to include
do not update the development dependencies. (Deprecated)
output the operations but do not execute anything (implicitly enables --verbose)
do not perform operations (only update the lockfile)

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: shows the version of the project or bumps it when a valid bump rule is provided
